mapper.select:
select mpc.id, mpc.meal_plan_id, mpc.customer_id, mpc.customer_name, mpc.phone, cp.customer_code, mpc.order_id, mpc.parent_package_id, mpc.child_package_id, mpc.status, mpc.is_verified, mpc.verification_time, mpc.verification_operator, mpc.fail_reason, mpc.meat_required_count, mpc.veg_required_count, mpc.include_soup, mpc.include_rice, mpc.supplementary_main_count, mpc.supplementary_side_count, mpc.supplementary_veg_count, mpc.supplementary_rice_count, mpc.supplementary_soup_count, cp.special_requirements, cp.production_date, mpc.create_by, mpc.update_by, mpc.deleted, mpc.create_time, mpc.update_time from meal_plan_customer mpc left join customer_profile cp on mpc.customer_id = cp.id
mpc.deleted = 0
and mpc.meal_plan_id = #{criteria.mealPlanId}
and mpc.customer_name like concat('%', #{criteria.customerName}, '%')
and mpc.phone like concat('%', #{criteria.phone}, '%')
and mpc.status = #{criteria.status}
order by mpc.id asc

select id, meal_plan_id, customer_id, customer_name, phone, order_id, parent_package_id, child_package_id, status, is_verified, verification_time, verification_operator, fail_reason, meat_required_count, veg_required_count, include_soup, include_rice, supplementary_main_count, supplementary_side_count, supplementary_veg_count, supplementary_rice_count, supplementary_soup_count, create_by, update_by, deleted, create_time, update_time from meal_plan_customer where id = #{id} and deleted = 0

select mpc.id, mpc.meal_plan_id, mpc.customer_id, mpc.customer_name, mpc.phone, cp.customer_code, mpc.order_id, mpc.parent_package_id, mpc.child_package_id, mpc.status, mpc.is_verified, mpc.verification_time, mpc.verification_operator, mpc.fail_reason, mpc.meat_required_count, mpc.veg_required_count, mpc.include_soup, mpc.include_rice, mpc.supplementary_main_count, mpc.supplementary_side_count, mpc.supplementary_veg_count, mpc.supplementary_rice_count, mpc.supplementary_soup_count, cp.special_requirements, cp.production_date, mpc.create_by, mpc.update_by, mpc.deleted, mpc.create_time, mpc.update_time from meal_plan_customer mpc left join customer_profile cp on mpc.customer_id = cp.id where mpc.meal_plan_id = #{mealPlanId} and mpc.deleted = 0 order by mpc.id asc

select pp.package_code, pp.package_name, count(mpc.id) as meal_count from meal_plan mp join meal_plan_customer mpc on mp.id = mpc.meal_plan_id join parent_package pp on mpc.parent_package_id = pp.id where mp.record_date = #{date} and mp.deleted = 0 and mpc.deleted = 0 group by pp.id, pp.package_code, pp.package_name order by meal_count desc
mapper.update: update meal_plan_customer set is_verified = 1, verification_time = #{verificationTime}, verification_operator = #{verificationOperator}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and deleted = 0 and (is_verified = 0 or is_verified is null)
update meal_plan_customer set is_verified = 0, verification_time = null, verification_operator = null, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT mpc.customer_id, cp.customer_code, mpc.phone, COALESCE( (SELECT cpa.address_detail FROM customer_profile_address cpa WHERE cpa.customer_id = mpc.customer_id AND cpa.address_type = CASE WHEN DAYOFWEEK(mp.record_date) IN (1, 7) THEN 'WEEKEND' ELSE 'WORKDAY' END LIMIT 1), (SELECT cpa.address_detail FROM customer_profile_address cpa WHERE cpa.customer_id = mpc.customer_id AND cpa.address_type = 'DEFAULT' LIMIT 1) ) AS address_detail, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM customer_profile_address cpa2 WHERE cpa2.customer_id = mpc.customer_id AND cpa2.address_type = CASE WHEN DAYOFWEEK(mp.record_date) IN (1, 7) THEN 'WEEKEND' ELSE 'WORKDAY' END) THEN CASE WHEN DAYOFWEEK(mp.record_date) IN (1, 7) THEN 'WEEKEND' ELSE 'WORKDAY' END WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM customer_profile_address cpa3 WHERE cpa3.customer_id = mpc.customer_id AND cpa3.address_type = 'DEFAULT') THEN 'DEFAULT' ELSE NULL END AS address_type, cp.allergy_tags, cp.special_requirements, co.custom_menu_image FROM meal_plan_customer mpc JOIN meal_plan mp ON mpc.meal_plan_id = mp.id LEFT JOIN customer_profile cp ON mpc.customer_id = cp.id LEFT JOIN customer_order co ON mpc.order_id = co.id WHERE mpc.meal_plan_id = #{mealPlanId} AND mpc.deleted = 0 ORDER BY mpc.id ASC

select mp.id as mealPlanId, mpc.id as customerPlanId, mpc.customer_id as customerId, mp.record_date as recordDate, mp.meal_type as mealType, case when mpc.is_verified = 1 then true else false end as verified from meal_plan_customer mpc join meal_plan mp on mpc.meal_plan_id = mp.id where mpc.deleted = 0 and mp.deleted = 0 and mpc.status = 1 and mpc.customer_id = #{customerId} and mp.record_date = #{recordDate} and mp.meal_type = #{mealType} order by mpc.id asc

select id, meal_plan_id, customer_id, customer_name, phone, order_id, parent_package_id, child_package_id, status, is_verified, verification_time, verification_operator, fail_reason, meat_required_count, veg_required_count, include_soup, include_rice, supplementary_main_count, supplementary_side_count, supplementary_veg_count, supplementary_rice_count, supplementary_soup_count, create_by, update_by, deleted, create_time, update_time from meal_plan_customer where meal_plan_id = #{mealPlanId} and deleted = 0 and (is_verified = 0 or is_verified is null) order by id asc
